items_all_raw.title: Masayoshi Son questioned Musk's orbital AI data centers, noting electricity is just 7% of costs and the AI race will be won on Earth within a few years (Tim Higgins/Wall Street Journal)

items_all_raw.title_original: Apple's appeal to a London Court of Appeal ruling begins Monday at the UK Supreme Court; the ruling required it to pay $502M for using Optis' wireless patents (Alistair Gray/Financial Times)
items_all_raw.title_en: Apple's appeal to a London Court of Appeal ruling begins Monday at the UK Supreme Court; the ruling required it to pay $502M for using Optis' wireless patents (Alistair Gray/Financial Times)
items_all_raw.title_zh: 蘋果公司對倫敦上訴法院裁決的上訴將於週一在英國最高法院開始；該裁決要求其為使用 Optis 的無線專利支付 5.02 億美元（Alistair Gray/金融時報）

items_all_raw.title: Researchers say Z.ai's GLM-5.2 matches latest US models at finding security bugs, as critics question the US' lax approach in restricting Chinese open models (Wall Street Journal)
items_all_raw.title_original: Researchers say Z.ai's GLM-5.2 matches latest US models at finding security bugs, as critics question the US' lax approach in restricting Chinese open models (Wall Street Journal)
items_all_raw.title_en: Researchers say Z.ai's GLM-5.2 matches latest US models at finding security bugs, as critics question the US' lax approach in restricting Chinese open models (Wall Street Journal)
items_all_raw.title_zh: 研究人員表示，Z.ai 的 GLM-5.2 在發現安全漏洞方面與美國最新模型相匹配，因為批評者質疑美國在限制中國開放模型方面的鬆懈做法（華爾街日報）
items_all_raw.title_bilingual: 研究人員表示，Z.ai 的 GLM-5.2 在發現安全漏洞方面與美國最新模型相匹配，因為批評者質疑美國在限制中國開放模型方面的鬆懈做法（華爾街日報） / Researchers say Z.ai's GLM-5.2 matches latest US models at finding security bugs, as critics question the US' lax approach in restricting Chinese open models (Wall Street Journal)
